Since the thread is daemon and the method exits without ensuring the thread completes, the close in the thread is not guaranteed to execute before method exit. The release guarantee is weak because exceptions in the main thread (before thread start) or early JVM exit could skip the close. Also, the resource is not definitely released before method exit from the perspective of the main method.

Answer: Yes
